mapper.select:
SELECT c2.contract_time As contractTime, c2.contract_attr As contractAttr, c2.business_no As sellBusinessNo, r.product_name As productName, p2.deal_number As sellNumber, p2.deal_price As sellPrice, (p2.deal_number * p2.deal_price) As totalAmount, c1.business_no As buyBusinessNo, (p2.deal_price - p1.deal_price) As spreadSell, (p2.deal_price - p1.deal_price) * p2.deal_number As spreadTotal, c2.match_user_id As sellMatchId, c2.match_user_name As sellMatchName, c1.match_user_name As buyMatchName, c1.match_user_id As buyMatchId, c2.enterprise_id As enterpriseId, c2.dept_id As deptId FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id=r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id=r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id=r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id=r.sell_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c2.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c2.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c2.contract_attr = #{contractAttr}
AND c2.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c2.contract_status !='C' AND c1.contract_status !='C' ORDER BY c2.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p2.deal_number) As sellNumber, SUM(p2.deal_number * p2.deal_price) As totalAmount, SUM((p2.deal_price - p1.deal_price) * p2.deal_number) As spreadTotal FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id=r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id=r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id=r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id=r.sell_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c2.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c2.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c2.contract_attr = #{contractAttr}
AND c2.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c2.contract_status !='C' AND c1.contract_status !='C'

SELECT c.id As id, c.contract_time As contractTime, c.contract_attr As contractAttr, c.business_no As businessNo, p.product_name As productName, p.deal_number As dealNumber, p.deal_price As dealPrice, (p.deal_number * p.deal_price) As totalAmount, c.match_user_id As macthId, c.match_user_name As matchName, c.dept_id As deptId, c.enterprise_id As enterpriseId FROM t_ctr_product p LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON c.id= p.ctr_contract_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.contract_attr = #{contractAttr}
AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.contract_status !='C' ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) As dealNumber, SUM(p.deal_number * p.deal_price) As totalAmount FROM t_ctr_product p LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON c.id= p.ctr_contract_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.contract_attr = #{contractAttr}
AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.contract_status !='C'

SELECT c1.dept_id AS deptId, c1.match_user_id AS sellMatchId, c1.match_user_name AS sellMatchName, c1.business_no AS sellBusinessNo, p1.product_name AS productName, p1.deal_number AS dealNumber, p1.deal_price AS sellPrice, c2.business_no AS buyBusinessNo, p2.deal_price AS buyPrice, c2.match_user_id AS buyMatchId, c2.match_user_name AS buyMatchName, c1.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.sell_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id = r.buy_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m')
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m')
AND c1.total_amount = c1.dealed_amount AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c1.contract_status !='C' AND c2.contract_status !='C' AND c1.contract_type = 'S' ORDER BY c1.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p1.deal_number) As dealNumber FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.sell_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id = r.buy_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m')
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m')
AND c1.total_amount = c1.dealed_amount AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c1.contract_status !='C' AND c2.contract_status !='C' AND c1.contract_type = 'S'

SELECT c1.contract_time AS buyContractTime, c1.contract_attr AS contractAttr, c1.business_no AS buyBusinessNo, p1.product_name AS productName, p1.deal_number AS buyNumber, p1.deal_price AS buyPrice, p2.deal_number AS dealNumber, c2.business_no AS sellBusinessNo, c2.contract_time AS sellContractTime, ( p1.deal_number - ( SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE r.buy_contract_id = c1.id AND p.product_name = p1.product_name AND p.factory_id = p1.factory_id ) ) AS remainNumber, TIMESTAMPDIFF( HOUR, IFNULL( ( SELECT a.pay_date FROM t_apply_pay a WHERE a.contract_id = c1.id AND a.`status` = 'D' ORDER BY a.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), c1.contract_time ), NOW() ) AS inWarehouseHours, c1.match_user_id AS matchId, c1.match_user_name AS matchName, c1.dept_id AS deptId, c1.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c1.contract_status != 'C' AND c2.contract_status != 'C' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY c1.id DESC

SELECT SUM(p1.deal_number) As buyNumber, SUM(p2.deal_number) As dealNumber, SUM(( p1.deal_number - ( SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE r.buy_contract_id = c1.id AND p.product_name = p1.product_name AND p.factory_id = p1.factory_id ) )) As remainNumber FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON p1.id = r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p2 ON p2.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()
DATE_FORMAT(c1.contract_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{searchTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c1.contract_status != 'C' AND c2.contract_status != 'C' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
